intent: Swap Bedroom2 and Master so Bedroom2 is on the right. Block-swap the entire private row so the ensuite stays attached to the Master.

warnings.message: Shared wall conflict: Bedroom2.left is 'window' but Bath2.right is 'solid'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.
Shared wall conflict: Bath2.left is 'solid' but MasterBath.right is 'window'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.
Shared wall conflict: Bedroom2.left is 'window' but Bath2.right is 'solid'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.
Shared wall conflict: Bath2.left is 'solid' but MasterBath.right is 'window'. Adjacent walls should have matching types for consistent rendering.

outcome: applied; plan valid (no errors). Two cosmetic wall_type warnings appear because the bedroom-block swap turned formerly-exterior 'window' walls into interior shared walls; not a blocker per the user's bail-out rule, and the user can be asked next turn whether to retype them. Critic score 100 / allClean.
